description_long: This is a Panasonic CQ-C7401W car radio receiver, featuring a rectangular metal chassis with a brushed metallic front panel. The front face is equipped with two large rotary knobs on either side, likely for volume and tuning, and several smaller buttons for additional controls. A central display screen is present, flanked by labeled buttons and a disc slot, indicating support for CD playback. The sides and top are solid, matte-finished metal, providing structural durability and heat dissipation. The overall design is compact, intended for dashboard installation in vehicles, with a utilitarian yet modern aesthetic. The branding and model information are clearly visible on the front panel.
description: A Panasonic CQ-C7401W car radio receiver with a metallic front panel, dual rotary knobs, a central display, and multiple control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic faceplate, two rotary knobs, central display, disc slot, and visible Panasonic branding.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, matte-finished metal side with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Rear/top view showing the flat, featureless metal top surface, emphasizing the unit's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Right side view with a similar solid, matte-finished metal side and the protrusion of the front panel.
